assignee.description: User to filter by. You can pass an email/display name or use the special form accountId:<ID> to target a specific accountId.

projectKey.description: Optional Jira project key to further restrict results (e.g., ENG).

includeClosed.description: If false (default), only unresolved issues are returned. If true, includes closed/done issues.

includeSubtasks.description: If false, excludes all sub-task issue types.

jql.description: Optional custom JQL. If provided, it overrides other filters.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return. Leave blank to get all default fields.

startAt.description: Index of the first record to return (pagination start).

maxResults.description: Page size per request (max 100 as per Jira API).

limit.description: Total maximum number of issues to return across all pages. 0 means no explicit cap (fetch all).
